phases.title: Freeze current head, inventory every file, and establish truthful baseline
Reconcile documentation, claims, governance ledgers, and repository identity
Stabilize canonical run-log, replay, bridge, intervention, and artifact semantics
Complete EC1 capture, intervention, replay, and infrastructure benchmarking
Freeze M0 population, estimands, data rights, holdout, contamination, and analysis governance
Complete H1 common preflight and Protocol A paired frozen-snapshot sensitivity
Implement H1 Protocol B randomized closed-loop effect modification
Complete H2 prospective censoring-aware failure prediction
Complete H4 representational availability versus causal policy use
Keep H3 PID conditional, gated, leakage-safe, and scientifically interpretable
Complete comparator frontier, uncertainty, power, multiplicity, and blind benchmarking
Harden SAFE and future real-VLA capture, tensor provenance, hooks, and data lineage
Migrate NCP/Engram observation and preserve optional ecosystem composition
Security, privacy, resource, parser, concurrency, and supply-chain hardening
Packaging, CI, reproducibility, usability, and release engineering
Independent verification, thesis-board evidence, local convergence, and final release
